===================
Jupyter and Skyline
===================

Sometimes you may need to access Skyline programmatically, as in running Python
code against Skyline or making or trying some change to Skyline configuration,
data, function, whatever it may be, it can be done.

Jupyter allows you to run Skyline functions access and/or change Skyline data,
test functions, etc in your browser.  There are things that can only be done in
that manner and using Jupyter allows for that.
